title: coelogyne spathulata
intro: Coelogyne spathulata, also known as the Spatulate Coelogyne, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne spathulata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. In terms of herbal preparations, Coelogyne spathulata is typically used in the form of a tea or decoction, where the roots and leaves of the plant are boiled in water to create a medicinal infusion.
